ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for the experiment */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES experiment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target gene or sample */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene or sample */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the target */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment applied to the target */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the target sample was collected */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions of the target sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment to which the result belongs */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target gene associated with the result */,
  "normalized_signal" REAL /* Normalized signal value obtained from the experiment */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value indicating statistical significance */,
  "flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the importance of the result (P = significant) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the result */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for analyzing the result */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the result (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the researcher works */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher (e.g., associate, senior) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "lab_location" TEXT /* Location of the researcher's lab */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of experiment */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the experiment type (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  "standard_operating_procedure" TEXT /* Standard operating procedure for the experiment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., environmental, chemical) */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition (e.g., temperature, pH) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source used */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., Database, API) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of accessing the data source (e.g., API key, username/password) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the metadata */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., 'species', 'treatment') */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata key */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., biological, experimental) */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., experiment log, external database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
